text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Chiyo! ♪ Wanna go shopping together
sometime?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You want to go shopping?! With me?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I found some totally rad clothes that would be
perf for you, so I want you to try them on. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Y-you went out of your way to find clothes just
for me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Let me know when you're free. Well, anyway, time to make like a banana and split.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow... I can't wait to go shopping with Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! I almost forgot how bloated my stomach's
been recently...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whatever will I do if I can't fit into the clothes she
picked for me?! I have to do something about this
right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling pressured, Sakura Chiyono O does her
best to adjust her diet to help reduce her
bloating, and it's a great success.
